zh.lifeSummary: 當Agathe de Lorraine於大約1120年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希時，她的父親Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine46歲，母親Adelheid van Leuven32歲。她於大約1130年與Renaud III comte de Bourgogne結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1147年4月在德國貝也史瓦本享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agathe de Lorraine于大约1120年出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希时，她的父亲Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine46岁，母亲Adelheid van Leuven32岁。她于大约1130年与Renaud III comte de Bourgogne结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1147年4月在德国貝也史瓦本享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Agathe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Agathe de Lorraine was born about 1120, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, was 46 and her mother, Adelheid van Leuven, was 32. She married Renaud III comte de Bourgogne about 1130. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in April 1147, in Swabia, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agathe de Lorraine est née environ 1120, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Adelheid van Leuven, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Renaud III comte de Bourgogne environ 1130. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en avril 1147, à Schwaben, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agathe de Lorraine um 1120 in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine 46 und ihre Mutter Adelheid van Leuven 32. Sie hat um 1130 Renaud III comte de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb im April 1147 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Schwaben, Bayern, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agathe de Lorraine è nata il circa 1120 nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Adelheid van Leuven, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Renaud III comte de Bourgogne circa 1130. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel aprile 1147, nel Schwaben, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.Schwaben, Bavaria, Germany: ドイツバイエルンスチワベン
ja.Saint-Dié, Vosges, Lorraine, France: フランスロレィヌボスジェズサイント-ディe
ja.Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Burgundy, France: フランスボウルゴグンサoネ-エト-ロイアームaコン
ja.Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, France: フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシ
ja.lifeSummary: Agathe de Lorraineが約1120年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシで生まれた時，父Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraineは46歳，母Adelheid van Leuvenは32歳であった。約1130年にRenaud III comte de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1147年4月にドイツバイエルンスチワベンで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agathe de Lorraine(이)가 대략 1120년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid van Leuven(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1130년 Renaud III comte de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1147년 4월 독일 베이른 슈와벤에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agathe de Lorraine nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid van Leuven, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Renaud III comte de Bourgogne aproximadamente 1130. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em abril de 1147, em Schwaben, Bayern, Alemanha, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agathe de Lorraine родилась около 1120 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid van Leuven, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Renaud III comte de Bourgogne около 1130 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла апрель 1147 г. в местности щвабен, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agathe de Lorraine nació aproximadamente 1120, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Adelheid van Leuven, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Renaud III comte de Bourgogne aproximadamente 1130. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en abril de 1147, en Schwaben, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 28 años.
